notes: Tune these queries to the exact CORE Paper topic as soon as scope is finalized.

queries.name: robot-learning-control
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:"robot learning" OR all:"model predictive control" OR all:"adaptive control")

queries.name: sim2real-and-robustness
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:sim2real OR all:domain shift OR all:robustness)

queries.name: manipulation-and-planning
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:manipulation OR all:planning OR all:grasp)
